{{Quote|I merely noticed that in both of their attacks a laser salvo preceded their missiles in a distinct and predictable pattern. When they launched their third attack, I was able to fire back just as the tubes' protective doors opened, detonating the missiles before they could be launched. Fighters that size never have sufficient armor to withstand that sort of internal blast.|Commander [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] describing how he had destroyed two Vagaari fighters|<ref name="OBF" />}}
'''Vagaari fighters''' were [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used by the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. They were as maneuverable as [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], though with more firepower. They could also fly in a complex dance-like pattern which made them difficult to hit. They were launched from a [[Paskla-class cruiser|''Paskla''-class cruiser]] disguised as a [[Geroon (species)|Geroon]] refugee ship.<ref name="SVVQ">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>

Around [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], the Vagaari used '''close-in fighters''' during a [[skirmish in the Crustai system]] and a [[Battle of Geroon|battle near the Crustai base]]. Little is known about these fighters except that they were equipped with [[Laser/Legends|laserfire]] and [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] and that [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]] was able to predict their firing pattern and therefore easily destroy them.<ref name="OBF" />
